/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/test-peg-parser.dir/test-peg-parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test-peg-parser.dir/peg-parser/simple-tokenize.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test-peg-parser.dir/peg-parser/test-basic.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test-peg-parser.dir/peg-parser/test-gbnf-generation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test-peg-parser.dir/peg-parser/test-json-parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test-peg-parser.dir/peg-parser/test-json-serialization.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test-peg-parser.dir/peg-parser/test-unicode.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test-peg-parser.dir/get-model.cpp.o" -o ../bin/test-peg-parser  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/kevin/Desktop/p2pllms/llama/llamasrc/build/bin ../common/libcommon.a ../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security ../bin/libllama.0.0.8182.dylib ../bin/libggml.0.9.7.dylib ../bin/libggml-cpu.0.9.7.dylib ../bin/libggml-blas.0.9.7.dylib ../bin/libggml-metal.0.9.7.dylib ../bin/libggml-base.0.9.7.dylib
